entity.summary: Crypto derivatives exchange focused on options and futures markets. HEI records Deribit as an active exchange with event-backed history, including Coinbase's 2025 agreement to acquire Deribit in a large cash-and-stock transaction.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0707 and hei_unadded_0708 after event-backed review. Deribit remains active; this record does not mark it as closed. Related future Coinbase/Deribit product rows should not be split without a methodology decision.

events.title: Coinbase announced agreement to acquire Deribit
events.description: Coinbase announced an agreement to acquire Deribit in a transaction reported at about $2.9 billion, expanding Coinbase into crypto derivatives and options markets.
events.notes: This event records the acquisition announcement / agreement. It does not by itself mark Deribit as shut down.

events.title: Deribit consolidated as active exchange entity
events.description: Deribit and Deribit Spot candidate rows are consolidated into one active centralized derivatives exchange entity.
events.notes: Consumes verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0707 and hei_unadded_0708.

evidence.title: Coinbase to buy derivatives exchange Deribit in a $2.9 billion deal
evidence.notes: Reuters report on Coinbase's agreement to acquire Deribit.

evidence.title: Coinbase strikes $2.9 billion deal for major crypto options platform
evidence.notes: Report describing Coinbase's agreement to acquire Deribit and Deribit's role in options, futures, and spot trading.

evidence.title: Deribit official website
evidence.notes: Official website used to verify active identity.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Deribit
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0707.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Deribit Spot
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0708.
